title: Acceptance Criteria: starter lifecycle trace demo

prioritization.priority_rationale: The acceptance set is the final starter guardrail that proves the trace can reach release readiness without hidden scope.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: QA should confirm the seeded criteria remain bounded and objectively testable.

criteria.statement: The starter trace shows one story-planning output linked back to the seeded PRD and canonical item.
The starter trace exposes acceptance-ready criteria that remain within the seeded story scope.
The starter trace reaches release readiness while keeping launch preparation and outcome review explicitly not started.
